For Nightreign, seek Nightreign Weapons.

Weapons, also known as Armaments, are equipment items in Elden Ring and Shadow of the Erdtree.

Weapons scale in power based on the player's attributes. Several weapons can be wielded two-handed, affecting their attack strength and animation patterns. For keyboard controls, the command to switch to two-handed mode is to hold E and then click the attack button of the weapon in question.

There are two types of Armaments: generic weapons that are upgraded with Smithing Stones and unique weapons, which are bolstered with Somber Smithing Stones. Armaments may be improved by interacting with Smithing Master Hewg, Smithing Master Iji, or the Smithing Table at the Church of Elleh. Armaments of both types fall into one of four categories: Melee Armaments, Ranged Armaments, Catalysts, and Shields.

Weapon Class Categories[]

Melee Armaments

  • Axes
  • Backhand Blades
  • Beast Claws
  • Claws
  • Colossal Swords

Cut Content[]

A number of weapons were cut from the final version of Elden Ring.

  • Abundance and Decay Twinblade
  • Abundance Twinblade
  • Buckshot Crossbow
  • Burial Axe
  • Carian Troll Greatsword
  • Father Marika's Hammer
  • Heavy Erdtree Greatshield
  • Heavy Inseparable Sword
  • Heavy Sword of Milos
  • Heavy Varré's Bouquet
  • Heavy Watchdog's Crosier
  • Heretic's Hook
  • Holy Inferno Greatsword
  • Occult Marika's Hammer
  • Sharktooth Curved Sword
  • Storm Arrow
Blackflame Monk's Seal
Buckshot Crossbow
Carian Troll Greatsword
Sharktooth Curved Sword
ID 12235 - Axe
ID 10923 - Celebrant's Lantern[1]
ID 10725 - Godskin Scythe[2]

Notes[]

  • Certain Tools may also be used to deal damage.
  • The player uses the Unarmed moveset when no weapons are equipped.

  • Buffs
  • Nightreign Armaments
  • Paired Weapons

References[]

  1. ↑ No official name. This weapon is a candle lantern carried by Dominula Dancers who throw Fire Pots and Oil Pots.
  2. ↑ No official name. This weapon's design is similar to those wielded by the Godskin Apostles. It may be Heretic's Hook.
